formulas.name: fSupportDriveSeasonCampaign
formulas.expression:
TEXT(YEAR({!$Record.Payment_Date__c})) & " " &
IF( MONTH({!$Record.Payment_Date__c}) <= 3, "Winter",
IF( MONTH({!$Record.Payment_Date__c}) <= 5, "Spring",
IF( MONTH({!$Record.Payment_Date__c}) <= 9, "Summer", "Fall" ) ) )
& " Support Drive"

Flow.interviewLabel: Square: Auto Create Contact, Account, and Opp Records {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Square: Auto Create Contact, Account, and Opp Records
